title: Cardholder Data Encryption at Rest
description: Render PAN unreadable using strong cryptography wherever stored.

title: Strong Cryptography in Transit
description: Use TLS 1.2 minimum for all cardholder data transmission.

title: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Implement MFA for all non-console administrative access to CDE.

title: Audit Trail for CDE Access
description: Log all access to cardholder data with user identification.

title: Secure Coding Practices
description: Develop software using secure coding practices including OWASP Top 10.

title: Quarterly Vulnerability Scans
description: Conduct internal and external vulnerability scans quarterly.

title: Annual Penetration Testing
description: Perform external and internal penetration testing annually.

title: Incident Response Plan
description: Maintain documented incident response plan with breach procedures.

title: Lawful Basis for Guest Data
description: Document lawful basis for guest personal data processing.

title: Right of Access
description: Respond to guest data subject access requests within one month.

title: Right to Erasure
description: Implement right-to-be-forgotten for guest accounts and reservations.

title: Granular Marketing Consent
description: Obtain freely given specific consent for hotel marketing communications.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures by design and default.

title: Records of Processing Activities
description: Maintain Article 30 records of processing activities.

title: Data Minimization
description: Process only personal data adequate, relevant, and limited to purpose.

title: ADA Title III Public Accommodations
description: Apply ADA Title III to hotels, restaurants, and event spaces.

title: ADA Hotel Reservations Rule
description: Comply with ADA reservations rule including accessible room descriptions.

title: ADA Web Accessibility
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for hotel booking sites.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA for hotel and restaurant websites.

title: European Accessibility Act
description: Comply with European Accessibility Act for EU-facing hospitality services.

title: California Consumer Privacy Rights
description: Honor CCPA rights for California guests.

title: CPRA Sensitive PI Limitation
description: Honor CPRA right to limit use of sensitive personal information.

title: FCRA for Employee Background Checks
description: Apply FCRA to employee background check authorizations and disclosures.

title: FACTA Red Flags Rule
description: Implement Identity Theft Prevention Program for covered hospitality accounts.

title: TCPA Hospitality Outreach
description: Comply with TCPA before automated marketing via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: CAN-SPAM Email Compliance
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for hotel marketing email.

title: OSHA General Industry Standards
description: Apply OSHA general industry standards to hospitality workplaces.

title: Bloodborne Pathogens for Housekeeping
description: Apply bloodborne pathogens standard to housekeeping staff.

title: Ergonomics for Hotel Staff
description: Apply ergonomic best practices for housekeeping and kitchen staff.

title: Title II Civil Rights Act
description: Avoid discrimination in public accommodations per Title II.

title: FLSA Tipped Worker Compliance
description: Apply FLSA tipped worker rules including 80/20 rule.

title: FLSA Minimum Wage and Overtime
description: Comply with federal and state minimum wage and overtime requirements.

title: FDA Food Code Adoption
description: Apply FDA Food Code 2022 in food service operations.

title: Local Health Department Permits
description: Maintain local health department food service permits and inspections.

title: TTB Alcohol Service Compliance
description: Comply with TTB regulations for hotel alcohol service.

title: State Liquor License Compliance
description: Maintain state liquor licenses with documented training programs.

title: BSA AML for Casino/Hotels
description: Apply BSA AML program to casino-affiliated hotels and large cash transactions.

title: OFAC Guest Screening
description: Screen large transactions and bookings against OFAC SDN list.

title: Innkeeper Liability Limits
description: Apply state innkeeper liability statutes for guest property.

title: Lodging/Occupancy Tax Collection
description: Collect and remit state and local lodging taxes.

title: Transient Occupancy Tax
description: Collect transient occupancy tax including for short-term rentals.

title: Sales Tax on Food and Beverage
description: Collect sales tax on prepared food and beverage per state rules.

title: EU Package Travel Directive
description: Comply with EU Package Travel Directive for combined travel services.

title: EU Distance Selling Cancellation
description: Apply 14-day cancellation right for distance hotel bookings (with hospitality exemption considerations).

title: EU Geo-Blocking Regulation
description: Avoid prohibited geo-blocking per EU Geo-blocking Regulation.

title: EU Digital Services Act
description: Comply with DSA for online travel/booking marketplaces.

title: Short-Term Rental Platform Rules
description: Comply with state and city short-term rental platform regulations.

title: All-In Pricing Disclosure
description: Comply with FTC junk fees rule and state all-in pricing requirements.

title: Resort Fee Disclosure
description: Disclose resort fees prominently per FTC and state rules.

title: Hotel Tax Reporting
description: File hotel tax returns timely with state and local jurisdictions.

title: Event Liability and Insurance
description: Maintain liability insurance for hotel events and conferences.

title: Pool and Spa Safety
description: Maintain pool/spa safety per VGB Act and state codes.

title: VGB Pool and Spa Safety Act
description: Comply with VGB drain cover and safety vacuum release requirements.

title: NFPA Hotel Fire Safety
description: Comply with NFPA 101 Life Safety Code for hotels and lodging.

title: Hotel Sprinkler Requirements
description: Maintain fire sprinklers per NFPA 13 in hotels above threshold height/age.

title: Local Building Code Compliance
description: Comply with state-adopted building codes for hotel construction.

title: Energy Star for Lodging
description: Pursue Energy Star certification for hotel/lodging facilities meeting criteria.

title: ASHRAE 90.1 Energy Standard
description: Comply with ASHRAE 90.1 for hotel energy systems.

title: EU Energy Performance of Buildings
description: Comply with EU EPBD for European hotel properties.

title: Hidden Camera Prohibitions
description: Avoid hidden cameras in private guest spaces per state privacy laws.

title: Surveillance Notice
description: Post notice of surveillance cameras in public hotel spaces.

title: Tip Pooling Rules
description: Apply DOL tip pooling rules per FLSA and state law.

title: Hotel Worker Panic Buttons
description: Provide panic buttons to hotel workers per state and city laws.

title: Hospitality Anti-Trafficking
description: Train staff on anti-trafficking awareness per state mandates.

title: CDC Lodging Guidance
description: Apply CDC public health guidance for hotel cleaning and ventilation.

title: Legionella Water Management
description: Implement Legionella water management plan per ASHRAE 188.

title: ISO 22000 FSMS for Restaurants
description: Establish FSMS per ISO 22000 for hotel food service operations.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC for security.

title: Confidentiality Controls
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential guest information.

title: PMS Continuous Monitoring
description: Continuously monitor PMS access with automated alerting.

title: Hospitality ISMS
description: Establish ISMS for hospitality systems including PMS, POS, and reservation.

title: Guest Data Encryption
description: Apply ISO 27001 cryptographic controls to guest data at rest and in transit.

title: Sustainable Hospitality Reporting
description: Report sustainability metrics per CDP, GRI, or SASB hospitality standards.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK businesses with £36M+ turnover.

title: EU Whistleblower Protection
description: Maintain confidential whistleblower channels per EU Directive 2019/1937.

title: TCFD Climate Disclosure
description: Disclose climate-related risks per TCFD framework where applicable.

title: EU AI Act for Hospitality AI
description: Apply EU AI Act transparency obligations to hospitality AI (chatbots, dynamic pricing).

title: Green Lodging Certification
description: Pursue Green Key, EarthCheck, or LEED certification for lodging.

title: Loyalty Program Compliance
description: Comply with state loyalty program disclosure and forfeiture rules.

title: FTC Negative Option Rule
description: Comply with FTC Negative Option Rule for auto-renewing memberships.

title: Cuba Travel Restrictions
description: Comply with OFAC Cuba travel restrictions for US-affiliated lodging.

title: Foreign Guest Registration
description: Apply state foreign guest registration requirements where applicable.

title: Resort Fee Tax Treatment
description: Apply correct tax treatment to resort fees per state law.

title: FTC Endorsement Disclosures
description: Disclose paid endorsements in hotel marketing per FTC guidance.

title: Hospitality Cyber Insurance
description: Maintain cyber insurance covering guest data breach response.

title: Workers' Compensation Coverage
description: Maintain workers' compensation coverage per state requirements.

title: Liquor Liability Insurance
description: Maintain liquor liability insurance for hotels serving alcohol.

title: Premises Liability Insurance
description: Maintain premises liability insurance with appropriate limits.

title: Hotel Property Insurance
description: Maintain property insurance covering buildings and contents.

title: Business Interruption Coverage
description: Maintain business interruption coverage for revenue loss events.

title: DOL Joint Employer Rule
description: Comply with DOL joint employer rules for franchised hotels.

title: FTC Franchise Disclosure Document
description: Provide FDD per FTC Franchise Rule for franchised hotels.

title: E-Verify for Hospitality
description: Use E-Verify where state law mandates for new hires.

title: Hospitality Business Continuity
description: Establish BCMS for hotel operations continuity per ISO 22301.

title: Booking Platform DSA Obligations
description: Apply DSA notice-and-action for online booking platforms.

title: Guest Receipt PII Limitation
description: Limit PII printed on guest receipts to last 4 digits of card.

title: Service Provider Due Diligence
description: Maintain documented due diligence for PMS and POS service providers.

title: Hotel Star Rating Disclosure
description: Disclose accurate star rating per local tourism authority where regulated.
